basics.name: Thura Aung
basics.label: Low-resource Southeast Asian NLP researcher
basics.summary: Low-resource Southeast Asian NLP researcher focused on Burmese, multilingual multimodal LLMs, and dataset creation and evaluation for under-resourced languages.

work.summary: Part-time research on Southeast Asian language evaluation and Burmese NLP.
highlights: Translated instruction-following datasets for Burmese LLM evaluation.
Built evaluation datasets for seven Burmese NLP tasks.
Evaluated Burmese NLP benchmarks for LLMs.

work.summary: Part-time ML work on Thai speech and text systems.
highlights: Finetuned speech-augmented language modeling for Thai language.
Created synthetic Thai speech datasets with 25k sentences using Thai TTS.
Built evaluation pipelines for Thai TTS systems.

work.summary: Research on Burmese corpora, OCR, language modeling, and evaluation.
highlights: Built large-scale Myanmar corpora for OCR and language modeling.
Supervised speech corpus creation for the medical domain.
Fine-tuned transformer models for sequence and token classification tasks.
Reproduced experiments for myNLP, the first Burmese NLP toolkit.

education.institution: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang
education.area: B.Eng. in Software Engineering, Specialized in Artificial Intelligence

teaching.institution: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang
teaching.description: Supported 30+ freshmen in systems programming using Rust, assisted weekly labs, and conducted pre-session workshops on Rust syntax, compiler tools, and Cargo workflows.
